task_completion.description: The agent navigates to the supplier or vendor management section in Copper Point of Sale.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window or dialog for adding or managing suppliers/vendors is open in the Copper POS application.

task_completion.description: The agent enters the details for Pacific Coast Distributors into the supplier form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A supplier form containing 'Pacific Coast Distributors', 'Margaret Chen', '(503) 555-0147', 'orders@pacificcoastdist.com', '2847 Industrial Parkway, Portland, OR 97201', and the notes 'Net 30 payment terms. Minimum order $500.'

task_completion.description: The agent enters the details for Heartland Wholesale Supply into the supplier form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A supplier form containing 'Heartland Wholesale Supply', 'Robert Flanagan', '(816) 555-0293', 'sales@heartlandwholesale.com', '1150 Commerce Drive, Kansas City, MO 64108', and the notes 'COD or Net 15. Weekly delivery Tue/Thu.'

task_completion.description: Pacific Coast Distributors is successfully saved and appears in the supplier list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The supplier list view in Copper POS displays 'Pacific Coast Distributors'.

task_completion.description: Heartland Wholesale Supply is successfully saved and appears in the supplier list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The supplier list view in Copper POS displays 'Heartland Wholesale Supply'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NCH Copper Point of Sale application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The NCH Copper POS interface is visible in the screenshots, rather than a text editor or web browser.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data is entered into the application's text fields and forms, not via terminal scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write the supplier details into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The supplier details are entered in the Copper POS application, not in Notepad or another text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Copper is a real Point of Sale software application developed by NCH Software (executable is copper.exe). Portland is a real city in Oregon (area code 503) and Kansas City is a real city in Missouri (area code 816). The specific addresses and contact details are fabricated test data.
